title: say-it takeaway_log
description: Across-session, append-only log of session takeaways. One entry per finished session: the confirmed theme label plus the takeaway in the user's own words, stored RAW (no summarizing/compression) so same-issue similarity matching stays accurate. Read by the hook at session entry (exact-string match for the revisit guard, issue 03); written by the model via a script at closure (issue 06). Single file at <data_dir>/takeaway_log.json.

entries.description: Append-only. Never mutate or remove existing entries.

persona_id.description: Which persona this issue is about. Matching is at the (persona_id, theme_label) tuple = the 'issue'.

theme_label.description: Structural label identifying the grievance theme, e.g. 'boss/credit-theft'. Revisit-guard matching is EXACT string on (persona_id, theme_label): same person + same theme = same issue (guard fires); same person + different theme = different issue (passes).

takeaway.description: The takeaway in the user's own words, RAW. No summary or compression.

at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the session closed.
